greeting: So, you have claimed the throne.
Now face the one who created the path itself.
blunder: After conquering kings, this is the move you choose? Fascinating.
I have witnessed empires rise and fall. None collapsed as suddenly as your position.
Somewhere across the cosmos, an ancient star exploded solely to warn me about that move.
check: Check. Even the stars saw this coming.
capture: Another piece falls. The universe remains predictable.
promotion: A new queen. Reality itself remains unimpressed.
default: Before there were Monarchs, there was only me.
I forged the trials you conquered.
Generations of rulers have stood where you stand.
victory: You have conquered a kingdom. But not yet yourself.
I calculated billions of futures. Not one prepared me for someone reaching this far while playing like that.
defeat: At last... someone has surpassed me.
